message.content:
@startuml
actor Player
participant "vc: VirologistController" as VC
participant "v:Virologist" as V
participant "rrs:RoundRunStrategy" as RRS
participant "vv:VirologistView" as VV

Player -> VC: 1 collectEventListener(e: Event)
activate VC
VC -> V: 2 getRoundRunStrategy()
activate V
V --> VC: 3 rrs
deactivate V
VC -> RRS: 4 collect(field: Field)
activate RRS
RRS --> VC: 5
deactivate RRS
VC -> VV: 6 renderActionMenu()
activate VV
VV --> VC: 7
deactivate VV
VC --> Player: 8
deactivate VC
@enduml
